Name: Age_Ranges_Years
Description: A list of age ranges that individuals must be in to qualify for an intervention. Each age range is a JSON object with a minimum and a maximum property. An individual is considered in range if their age is greater than or equal to the minimum age and less than the maximum age, in floating point years of age. It must have the same number of objects as **Num_Targeted_XXX** has elements.

Name: Distributions
Description: The ordered list of elements defining when, to whom, and how many interventions to distribute.

Name: End_Day
Description: The day to stop distributing the intervention. No interventions are distributed on this day or going forward.

Name: Intervention_Config
Description: The nested JSON of the actual intervention to be distributed by this event coordinator.

Name: Num_Targeted
Description: The number of individuals to target with the intervention. Note that this value will be scaled up by the population scaling factor equal to **Base_Population_Scale_Factor**. If using this parameter, **Num_Targeted_Males** and **Num_Targeted_Females** must be empty.

Name: Num_Targeted_Females
Description: The number of female individuals to distribute interventions to during this time period. If using this parameter with **Num_Targeted_Males** to target specific genders, they both must be the same length, and **Num_Targeted** must be empty.

Name: Num_Targeted_Males
Description: The number of male individuals to distribute interventions to during this time period. If using this parameter with **Num_Targeted_Females** to target specific genders, they both must be the same length, and **Num_Targeted** must be empty.

Name: Property_Restrictions_Within_Node
Example:
The following example restricts the intervention to individuals who are urban and high risk or urban and medium risk.
[link](../json/campaign-nchoosereventcoordinator_property_restrictions_within_node.json)
Description:
A list of the **IndividualProperty** key:value pairs, as defined in the demographics file, that individuals must have to be targeted by this intervention. See :ref:`demo-properties` parameters for more information.

This parameter allows you to specify AND and OR combinations of key:value pairs. You may specify individual property restrictions using either this parameter or **Property_Restrictions**, but not both.

Name: Start_Day
Description: The day to start distributing the intervention.
